title: ARIRANG Deluxe Vinyl Released with Hidden Track 'Come Over' Produced by Suga
detail: BTS releases the ARIRANG Deluxe Vinyl on April 3, 2026, featuring a vinyl-exclusive hidden track 'Come Over' produced by Suga (Min Yoon-gi), with additional credits to RM and J-Hope. The 15th track — not available on streaming platforms or CD — blends stadium anthem and pop elements, with expansive synthesizers, heavy stomping beats, and humming guitar. Fans immediately called for wider digital release. HYBE confirmed the track is a deliberate vinyl-only collector's item. The release drove a surge in physical pre-orders for the deluxe edition.

title: HYBE Debunks Fabricated BTS Streaming Data, Warns of Legal Action Against Misinformation
detail: On April 3, 2026, a fabricated image spread on social media platform X and online forums claiming that 'SWIM' — ARIRANG's lead single — recorded only 5,198 daily Spotify streams as of April 1. HYBE issued an official statement confirming the data was entirely fabricated, noting that SWIM's actual daily streams remained in the tens of millions. HYBE stated it would pursue legal action against those spreading false information. Fans celebrated HYBE's protective stance, with hashtags demanding action trending globally.
